title: Texas
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Texas

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Texas

You can apply for Medicaid in Texas by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Texas

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Texas

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Texas

CHIP in Texas

CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about CHIP in Texas.
